en-US.promotionalText: Track expenses, scan receipts, and understand your month in a clear, cute, powerful iPhone app.
en-US.whatsNew: We refined the first iPhone experience with authenticated cloud sync, shared family spaces and invites, optional notifications, native StoreKit subscriptions, clearer charts, and a friendlier budget setup flow.

es-ES.promotionalText: Controla gastos, escanea recibos y entiende tu mes con una app clara, cute y poderosa desde tu iPhone.
es-ES.whatsNew: Pulimos la experiencia de iPhone con sync autenticado, espacios familiares compartidos con invites, notificaciones opcionales, suscripciones nativas con StoreKit, mejores gráficas y un presupuesto paso a paso más amable.

review.notes:
SpendSage is a local-first personal-finance app for iPhone.

Review notes:
1. Sign in is required. Reviewers can create a fresh account with email or use Sign in with Apple / Google from the first screen.
2. This TestFlight/external-beta line is intentionally pointed to the authenticated dev backend. That is expected for this beta review.
3. Free accounts remain local-first after authentication; the core flow is onboarding, dashboard, expense capture, receipt scan, insights, sync, and settings.
4. Shared family spaces and invite flows are available after sign in, but review can focus on the personal authenticated flow if desired.
5. Receipt scan uses on-device Vision or VisionKit assistance; the user always reviews and edits the draft before saving.
6. Calendar, notifications, and location access are optional and only used when the user triggers those features explicitly.
7. This build does not use cross-app tracking or background geolocation. Reliability diagnostics and product telemetry are first-party only.
8. StoreKit purchase surfaces are visible in Premium, with products configured in App Store Connect.

en-US.description: SpendSage is a local-first personal finance beta for iPhone. Sign in is required before using the app. Testers can create an account with email or continue with Sign in with Apple or Google, then track expenses, sync a personal space, invite a household into a shared family space, validate optional notifications, scan receipts, review insights, configure budgets, and explore native StoreKit purchase surfaces.

es-MX.description: SpendSage es una beta local-first de finanzas personales para iPhone. El inicio de sesión es obligatorio antes de usar la app. Los testers pueden crear una cuenta con email o continuar con Sign in with Apple o Google, luego registrar gastos, sincronizar un espacio personal, invitar a su hogar a un espacio familiar compartido, validar notificaciones opcionales, escanear recibos, revisar insights, configurar presupuestos y explorar las pantallas de compra nativas con StoreKit.

en-US.whatsNew: Build 29 refines the beta UX with the restored bottom tab bar, cleaner mission and plan language, SES-backed family invite emails, simpler receipt scanning, smoother family-sharing surfaces, and the latest authenticated cloud readiness fixes.

es-MX.whatsNew: La build 29 pule la UX de beta con el tab bar inferior restaurado, lenguaje más claro de misiones y planes, invitaciones family por SES, escaneo de recibos más simple y los últimos ajustes de sync autenticado.

spendsage.remove_ads.reviewNote: Plus Local non-consumable for authenticated users. It removes sponsor cards, raises local starter limits, and unlocks local recurring bills without unlocking Pro sync, CSV, rules, accounts, or Family.

en-US.name: SpendSage Local Plus
en-US.description: More local scans, bills, and no sponsor cards.

es-ES.name: SpendSage Plus local
es-ES.description: Más escaneos locales, facturas y sin anuncios.

spendsage.pro.monthly.reviewNote: Monthly Pro unlock for authenticated users. Premium purchase surfaces live in the iPhone app. Review can validate product display and purchase flow from the Premium screen after sign in.

es-ES.name: SpendSage Pro mensual
es-ES.description: Respaldo, recibos, insights y sin anuncios

en-US.name: SpendSage Pro Annual
en-US.description: Full Pro plan billed yearly with backup and sync

es-ES.name: SpendSage Pro anual
es-ES.description: Plan Pro anual con respaldo, sync y recibos

spendsage.family.monthly.reviewNote: Monthly Family unlock for authenticated users. Shared spaces and invite flows are now available in the beta after sign in, and review can validate product availability and purchase presentation from the Premium screen.

en-US.name: SpendSage Family Monthly
en-US.description: Shared household spaces, invites, sync, and no ads
